title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 143.671 - Evidence of related federal determination admissible, when
text:
143.671.  Evidence of related federal determination admissible, when. — Evidence of a federal determination relating to issues raised in a proceeding under section 143.631 shall be admissible, under rules established by the administrative hearing commission.
(L. 1972 S.B. 549, A.L. 1978 S.B. 661)
